B. Enable autoscaling on the GKE cluster and enable horizontal pod autoscaling on your application deployments. Send curl requests to your application, and validate if the auto scaling works.
C. Replicate the application over multiple GKE clusters in every Google Cloud region. Configure a global HTTP(S) load balancer to expose the different clusters over a single global IP address.
D. Use Cloud Debugger in the development environment to understand the latency between the different microservices.
description:
題目重點：
• 環境：Web 應用部署在 GKE
• 需求：
  - 預期有數萬名使用者
  - 需要確保應用延遲低於特定閾值
  - 需要驗證當前部署的效能

選項分析：

A. 使用 load testing 工具模擬預期的併發用戶與請求，檢查結果
• ✅ 正確做法
• 可以模擬真實使用情境，檢測應用的延遲、吞吐量、瓶頸
• 不會影響實際生產流量，符合測試需求

B. 啟用 GKE Cluster 和 Pod 的 autoscaling，並用 curl 發送請求
• ❌ curl 只能模擬少量請求
• 無法有效模擬數萬名使用者的流量
• 無法完整測試效能與延遲

C. 在多區 GKE cluster 配置全球負載平衡
• ❌ 這是擴展部署方案，不是效能測試方法
• 過於複雜且不符合題目要求的測試目標

D. 使用 Cloud Debugger 了解微服務間延遲
• ❌ Cloud Debugger 主要用於除錯
• 無法模擬高流量或測試整體延遲

question: Your company has a Kubernetes application that pulls messages from Pub/Sub and stores them in Filestore. Because the application is simple, it was deployed as a single pod. The infrastructure team has analyzed Pub/Sub metrics and discovered that the application cannot process the messages in real time. Most of them wait for minutes before being processed. You need to scale the elaboration process that is I/O-intensive. What should you do?
choices: A. Use kubectl autoscale deployment APP_NAME --max 6 --min 2 --cpu-percent 50 to configure Kubernetes autoscaling deployment.
B. Configure a Kubernetes autoscaling deployment based on the subscription/push_request_latencies metric.
C. Use the --enable-autoscaling flag when you create the Kubernetes cluster.
D. Configure a Kubernetes autoscaling deployment based on the subscription/num_undelivered_messages metric.
description:
題目重點：
• 應用環境：Kubernetes Pod 拉取 Pub/Sub 訊息並寫入 Filestore
• 問題：
  - 單一 Pod 無法即時處理訊息
  - 訊息延遲數分鐘才處理
• 需求：
  - 橫向擴展（scale out）以處理更多訊息
  - 應用是 I/O 密集型，CPU 不是主要瓶頸

選項分析：

A. 使用 CPU 指標做自動擴展
• ❌ CPU 指標不適合 I/O 密集型應用
• 擴展策略可能無法有效回應 Pub/Sub 訊息積壓

B. 基於 subscription/push_request_latencies 做自動擴展
• ❌ 延遲指標可能反應不及時
• 無法快速應對訊息堆積

C. 建立 Kubernetes cluster 時啟用 cluster-autoscaling
• ❌ 只允許節點數自動擴展，未針對 Pod 層面負載自動擴展

D. 基於 subscription/num_undelivered_messages 做自動擴展
• ✅ 正確做法
• Pod 數量根據 Pub/Sub 未處理訊息數量自動增加
• 適合 I/O 密集型且延遲敏感的工作負載
• 可確保即時處理能力，減少訊息積壓

question: Your company is developing a web-based application. You need to make sure that production deployments are linked to source code commits and are fully auditable. What should you do?
choices: A. Make sure a developer is tagging the code commit with the date and time of commit.
B. Make sure a developer is adding a comment to the commit that links to the deployment.
C. Make the container tag match the source code commit hash.
D. Make sure the developer is tagging the commits with latest.

question: An application development team has come to you for advice. They are planning to write and deploy an HTTP(S) API using Go 1.12. The API will have a very unpredictable workload and must remain reliable during peaks in traffic. They want to minimize operational overhead for this application. Which approach should you recommend?
choices: A. Develop the application with containers, and deploy to Google Kubernetes Engine.
B. Develop the application for App Engine standard environment.
C. Use a Managed Instance Group when deploying to Compute Engine.
D. Develop the application for App Engine flexible environment, using a custom runtime.
description:
題目重點：
• 應用類型：HTTP(S) API，使用 Go 1.12
• 工作負載：非常不可預測，流量可能暴增
• 需求：
  - 可靠性 → 高峰流量也能維持服務
  - 最小化運維負擔
  - 適合快速部署

選項分析：

A. 容器化後部署到 GKE
• ❌ 優點：可自動擴展、高度可控制
• 缺點：仍需管理集群、網路、節點等運維
• 與「最小化運維」不符

B. App Engine Standard Environment
• ✅ 優點：
  - 完全無伺服器，不需管理基礎設施
  - 支援自動水平擴展，即使流量暴增也可靠
  - 支援 Go 1.12 內建 runtime
• 完全符合題目需求

C. Managed Instance Group on Compute Engine
• ❌ 可以自動擴展，但仍需管理 OS、更新、啟動腳本
• 運維負擔比 App Engine 大

D. App Engine Flexible Environment with custom runtime
• ❌ 適合特殊需求或自訂 runtime
• 啟動時間較長，成本較高，運維負擔略高
• 對 Go 1.12 並非必要

question: Your company is designing its data lake on Google Cloud and wants to develop different ingestion pipelines to collect unstructured data from different sources. After the data is stored in Google Cloud, it will be processed in several data pipelines to build a recommendation engine for end users on the website. The structure of the data retrieved from the source systems can change at any time. The data must be stored exactly as it was retrieved for reprocessing purposes in case the data structure is incompatible with the current processing pipelines. You need to design an architecture to support the use case after you retrieve the data. What should you do?
choices: A. Send the data through the processing pipeline, and then store the processed data in a BigQuery table for reprocessing.
B. Store the data in a BigQuery table. Design the processing pipelines to retrieve the data from the table.
C. Send the data through the processing pipeline, and then store the processed data in a Cloud Storage bucket for reprocessing.
D. Store the data in a Cloud Storage bucket. Design the processing pipelines to retrieve the data from the bucket.
description:
題目重點：
• 使用案例：建置資料湖 (data lake)
• 資料類型：非結構化資料 (unstructured)
• 需求：
  1. 資料結構可能隨時改變
  2. 原始資料需完整保存，以便重新處理
  3. 將用於多個處理 pipeline (例如推薦引擎)
• 關鍵要求：原始資料需「直接存下來」，不先經過處理

選項分析：

A. 先處理後存 BigQuery
• ❌ 資料先經過處理 → 可能丟失原始資訊
• BigQuery 適合結構化或半結構化資料
• 不符合「完整保存原始資料」需求

B. 直接存 BigQuery
• ❌ BigQuery 對 schema 有要求
• 資料結構改變時可能無法儲存或需要調整 schema
• 不適合非結構化資料

C. 先處理後存 Cloud Storage
• ❌ 原始資料被處理過 → 可能無法重新處理

D. 直接存 Cloud Storage
• ✅ Cloud Storage 可以存任意非結構化資料 (JSON, images, logs, binary)
• 完整保存原始資料 → 支持重新處理
• 後續 pipeline 可以直接從 bucket 讀取原始資料
• 完全符合題目需求

question: You are responsible for the Google Cloud environment in your company. Multiple departments need access to their own projects, and the members within each department will have the same project responsibilities. You want to structure your Google Cloud environment for minimal maintenance and maximum overview of IAM permissions as each department's projects start and end. You want to follow Google-recommended practices. What should you do?
choices: A. Grant all department members the required IAM permissions for their respective projects.

B. Create a Google Group per department and add all department members to their respective groups. Create a folder per department and grant the respective group the required IAM permissions at the folder level. Add the projects under the respective folders.

C. Create a folder per department and grant the respective members of the department the required IAM permissions at the folder level. Structure all projects for each department under the respective folders.
D. Create a Google Group per department and add all department members to their respective groups. Grant each group the required IAM permissions for their respective projects.
description:
題目重點：
• 使用案例：管理公司內多部門的 Google Cloud 環境
• 需求：
  1. 每個部門成員有相同的專案職責
  2. 部門專案會隨時開始與結束 → IAM 管理需簡單
  3. 維護成本低，並可清楚查看權限

選項分析：

A. 直接給每個部門成員各自專案的權限
• ❌ 隨著人員或專案變動需要大量手動操作
• IAM 管理維護成本高

B. 建立 Google Group + 部門資料夾，將 IAM 權限套用到資料夾
• ✅ 部門成員集中管理在 Google Group → 人員異動只需更新群組
• 資料夾套用 IAM → 下屬專案自動繼承權限
• 易於維護、清楚掌握權限概況
• 完全符合 Google 建議做法

C. 部門資料夾套用 IAM 但直接給個別成員
• ❌ 人員異動仍需手動變更 IAM
• 不如使用 Google Group 集中管理方便

D. 建立 Google Group，但 IAM 仍套用到專案
• ❌ 雖可使用 Group 管理成員，但每個專案仍需單獨設定權限
• 管理成本仍高

question: Your company has an application running as a Deployment in a Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE) cluster. You have separate clusters for development, staging, and production. You have discovered that the team is able to deploy a Docker image to the production cluster without first testing the deployment in development and then staging. You want to allow the team to have autonomy but want to prevent this from happening. You want a Google Cloud solution that can be implemented quickly with minimal effort. What should you do?
choices: A. Configure a Kubernetes lifecycle hook to prevent the container from starting if it is not approved for usage in the given environment.
B. Implement a corporate policy to prevent teams from deploying Docker images to an environment unless the Docker image was tested in an earlier environment.
C. Configure binary authorization policies for the development, staging, and production clusters. Create attestations as part of the continuous integration pipeline.
D. Create a Kubernetes admissions controller to prevent the container from starting if it is not approved for usage in the given environment.
description:
題目重點：
• 使用案例：GKE 多環境 (dev/staging/prod) 部署管理
• 問題：開發團隊可以直接把 Docker image 部署到 production，跳過 dev/staging
• 需求：
  1. 團隊仍需一定的自主性
  2. 阻止未經測試的 image 進入 production
  3. 快速、最小成本的解決方案

選項分析：

A. Kubernetes lifecycle hook
• ❌ 只會在 container 啟動時觸發
• 無法驗證 CI/CD pipeline 或 image 是否經過測試
• 實作成本與維護仍高

B. 公司政策
• ❌ 只是流程規範，無法技術性阻止部署
• 依賴人工遵守

C. Binary Authorization + CI/CD attestations
• ✅ 可強制執行 image 的測試順序
• 針對 dev/staging/prod 分別設置 policy
• CI/CD pipeline 可自動產生 attestations → 符合 image 已經通過測試的要求
• 快速上手，Minimal operational overhead
• 完全符合「允許自主性但防止跳級部署」需求

D. Kubernetes admission controller
• ⚠️ 可能實現相似功能，但需要自訂程式碼與維護
• Binary Authorization 是 Google 提供的管理現成方案，更簡單且推薦

question: Your company wants to migrate their 10-TB on-premises database export into Cloud Storage. You want to minimize the time it takes to complete this activity, the overall cost, and database load. The bandwidth between the on-premises environment and Google Cloud is 1 Gbps. You want to follow Google-recommended practices. What should you do?
choices: A. Develop a Dataflow job to read data directly from the database and write it into Cloud Storage.
B. Use the Data Transfer appliance to perform an offline migration.
C. Use a commercial partner ETL solution to extract the data from the on-premises database and upload it into Cloud Storage.
D. Compress the data and upload it with gsutil -m to enable multi-threaded copy.
description:
題目重點：
• 10 TB on-premises DB export → 搬到 Cloud Storage
• 條件：最小化完成時間、最小化整體成本、最小化 DB 負載
• 現有頻寬：1 Gbps
• 要符合 Google 建議做法

選項分析：

A. Dataflow 讀 DB → GCS
• ❌ 直接從 DB 大量讀取 → 對 DB 負載很大
• 不符合「最小化 DB load」

B. Data Transfer Appliance（離線遷移）
• ✅ 將 DB dump/export → 寫入 Appliance → 寄送到 Google 匯入
• 避免長時間 1Gbps 傳輸
• 不影響 DB 線上運作
• 官方建議做法 → 最快且成本可控

C. 商業 ETL 解決方案
• ❌ 多數仍是線上傳輸
• 成本較高，速度未必快
• 不符合「最小化時間與成本」

D. 壓縮 + gsutil -m
• ❌ 可加快頻寬利用率，但 10TB 在 1Gbps 下仍需數天
• 傳輸過程會長時間佔用頻寬 → 效率與可靠性不如 Appliance

question: Your company has an enterprise application running on Compute Engine that requires high availability and high performance. The application has been deployed on two instances in two zones in the same region in active-passive mode. The application writes data to a persistent disk. In the case of a single zone outage, that data should be immediately made available to the other instance in the other zone. You want to maximize performance while minimizing downtime and data loss. What should you do?
choices: A. 1. Attach a persistent SSD disk to the first instance. 2. Create a snapshot every hour. 3. In case of a zone outage, recreate a persistent SSD disk in the second instance where data is coming from the created snapshot.
B. 1. Create a Cloud Storage bucket. 2. Mount the bucket into the first instance with gcs-fuse. 3. In case of a zone outage, mount the Cloud Storage bucket to the second instance with gcs-fuse.
C. 1. Attach a regional SSD persistent disk to the first instance. 2. In case of a zone outage, force-attach the disk to the other instance.

D. 1. Attach a local SSD to the first instance disk. 2. Execute an rsync command every hour where the target is a persistent SSD disk attached to the second instance. 3. In case of a zone outage, use the second instance.
description:
題目重點：
• 使用案例：Enterprise 應用部署在 Compute Engine
• 特性：高可用、高效能
• 架構：部署在兩個不同可用區，active-passive 模式
• 資料：寫入 Persistent Disk
• 需求：
  1. 單區故障時，另一區能立即取得資料
  2. 最大化效能
  3. 最小化停機與資料損失

選項分析：

A. Persistent SSD + 每小時 snapshot
• ❌ 問題：
  • Snapshot 不是即時同步 → 最大可能有一小時資料損失
  • 無法滿足「立即可用」需求

B. Cloud Storage + gcs-fuse
• ❌ 問題：
  • gcs-fuse 效能低 → 不適合高效能需求
  • POSIX-like filesystem 不如 SSD 快
  • 雖可跨區，但無法最大化效能

C. Regional SSD persistent disk
• ✅ 優點：
  • 資料自動同步到兩個 zone → 立即可用
  • SSD 提供高效能
  • 適合 active-passive 架構
  • Google 官方推薦方式，滿足所有需求

D. Local SSD + 每小時 rsync
• ❌ 問題：
  • Local SSD 只在單一 VM/zone
  • rsync 每小時同步 → 無法立即可用
  • 高可用性與資料一致性不足

question: You are designing a Data Warehouse on Google Cloud and want to store sensitive data in BigQuery. Your company requires you to generate the encryption keys outside of Google Cloud. You need to implement a solution. What should you do?
choices: A. Generate a new key in Cloud Key Management Service (Cloud KMS). Store all data in Cloud Storage using the customer-managed key option and select the created key. Set up a Dataflow pipeline to decrypt the data and to store it in a new BigQuery dataset.
B. Generate a new key in Cloud KMS. Create a dataset in BigQuery using the customer-managed key option and select the created key.

C. Import a key in Cloud KMS. Store all data in Cloud Storage using the customer-managed key option and select the created key. Set up a Dataflow pipeline to decrypt the data and to store it in a new BigQuery dataset.
D. Import a key in Cloud KMS. Create a dataset in BigQuery using the customer-supplied key option and select the created key.
description:
題目重點：
• 使用案例：建立 BigQuery Data Warehouse
• 需求：
  1. 存放敏感資料
  2. 加密金鑰必須由公司自行產生（非 Google Cloud 生成）
  3. 符合 BigQuery 的加密選項

選項分析：

A. 先在 Cloud KMS 生成 key → Cloud Storage → Dataflow 解密再存入 BigQuery
• ❌ 問題：
  • Cloud KMS 生成 key → 不是公司自產生
  • 多此一舉解密再存入 BigQuery，不符合「直接加密 BigQuery」需求

B. Cloud KMS 生成 key → BigQuery dataset 使用 CMEK
• ❌ 問題：
  • Cloud KMS 生成 key → 不符合「公司自產生」要求
  • CMEK 只能使用 KMS 管理的 key

C. 將自產生 key 匯入 Cloud KMS → Cloud Storage → Dataflow 解密再存入 BigQuery
• ❌ 問題：
  • 雖然符合「自產生 key」並匯入 KMS
  • 仍需 Dataflow 解密 → 流程複雜
  • 題目重點是 BigQuery dataset 直接用自帶 key

D. 將自產生 key 匯入 Cloud KMS → BigQuery dataset 使用 customer-supplied key (CSK)
• ✅ 優點：
  • 公司自產生 key，符合題目要求
  • 直接套用在 BigQuery dataset，不需額外解密流程
  • CSK (Customer-Supplied Key) 是 BigQuery 支援的功能

question: Your organization has stored sensitive data in a Cloud Storage bucket. For regulatory reasons, your company must be able to rotate the encryption key used to encrypt the data in the bucket. The data will be processed in Dataproc. You want to follow Google-recommended practices for security. What should you do?
choices: A. Create a key with Cloud Key Management Service (KMS). Encrypt the data using the encrypt method of Cloud KMS.
B. Create a key with Cloud Key Management Service (KMS). Set the encryption key on the bucket to the Cloud KMS key.
C. Generate a GPG key pair. Encrypt the data using the GPG key. Upload the encrypted data to the bucket.
D. Generate an AES-256 encryption key. Encrypt the data in the bucket using the customer-supplied encryption keys feature.
description:
題目重點：
• 使用案例：Cloud Storage 存放敏感資料 → 在 Dataproc 處理
• 需求：
  1. 可依規定輪換加密金鑰
  2. 遵循 Google 推薦做法
  3. 適合 Cloud Storage + Dataproc 使用

選項分析：

A. Cloud KMS key + encrypt method → 手動加密資料
• ❌ 問題：
  • 需要手動管理加密/解密流程
  • 不方便輪換 key
  • 不符合推薦做法

B. Cloud KMS key → 設定桶的加密金鑰 (CMEK)
• ✅ 優點：
  • 桶級別自動加密，資料上傳自動使用 KMS key
  • 可以直接透過 KMS 進行 key 旋轉
  • 支援 Dataproc 存取
  • 遵循 Google 推薦做法

C. GPG key pair → 手動加密資料
• ❌ 問題：
  • 外部加密 → Cloud Storage + Dataproc 需手動解密
  • 不方便管理 key rotation
  • 非 Google 推薦做法

D. AES-256 → 客戶自供 key (CSEK)
• ❌ 問題：
  • 客戶自行管理金鑰
  • 不符合簡化管理 & Google 推薦做法
  • Key rotation 需自行實作

question: Your team needs to create a Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE) cluster to host a newly built application that requires access to third-party services on the internet. Your company does not allow any Compute Engine instance to have a public IP address on Google Cloud. You need to create a deployment strategy that adheres to these guidelines. What should you do?
choices: A. Configure the GKE cluster as a private cluster, and configure Cloud NAT Gateway for the cluster subnet.
B. Configure the GKE cluster as a private cluster. Configure Private Google Access on the Virtual Private Cloud (VPC).
C. Configure the GKE cluster as a route-based cluster. Configure Private Google Access on the Virtual Private Cloud (VPC).
D. Create a Compute Engine instance, and install a NAT Proxy on the instance. Configure all workloads on GKE to pass through this proxy to access third-party services on the Internet.

question: Your company has a support ticketing solution that uses App Engine Standard. The project that contains the App Engine application already has a Virtual Private Cloud (VPC) network fully connected to the company's on-premises environment through a Cloud VPN tunnel. You want to enable the App Engine application to communicate with a database that is running in the company's on-premises environment. What should you do?
choices: A. Configure private Google access for on-premises hosts only.
B. Configure private Google access.
C. Configure private services access.
D. Configure serverless VPC access.
description:
題目重點：
• 使用案例：App Engine Standard 在 Google Cloud 運行
• 特性：App Engine 需存取公司內部資料庫（on-premises），已有 VPC 與 on-premises VPN 連線
• 需求：
  1. App Engine Standard 可以透過 VPC 連到 on-premises 資料庫
  2. 需要 Google 推薦方式連接

選項分析：

A. Configure private Google access for on-premises hosts only
• ❌ 問題：
  • 允許 VPC 內的 VM 或 on-premises 主機存取 Google APIs，並限定來源是 on-premises 主機
  • 不適用於解決 App Engine 連線到 on-premises 的需求

B. Configure private Google access
• ❌ 問題：
  • 功能是允許沒有 Public IP 的 VM，仍可透過自身 Private IP 存取 Google APIs
  • 僅解決 VM → Google APIs 的場景，不是 VM 或 App Engine → on-premises 的解法

⚠️ 注意：
  • Private Google Access 不是 VPN、也不是讓 GCP 服務（像 App Engine）去連 on-premises。
  • 它單純是解決：在 VPC 裡沒有 public IP 的 VM，要怎麼安全地存取 Google APIs？

C. Configure private services access
• ❌ 問題：
  • 適用於 VPC 與 Google 服務之間的私有 IP 連線
  • 主要用於 Cloud SQL 或 VPC Peering
  • 不直接解決 App Engine → on-premises

D. Configure serverless VPC access
• ✅ 優點：
  • 專門用於 Serverless 服務（App Engine、Cloud Functions、Cloud Run）透過 VPC 連到內部網路或 on-premises
  • 透過 Serverless VPC Connector，App Engine 的流量可以進入已連到 on-premises 的 VPC

question: Your company is planning to upload several important files to Cloud Storage. After the upload is completed, they want to verify that the uploaded content is identical to what they have on-premises. You want to minimize the cost and effort of performing this check. What should you do?
choices: A. 1. Use Linux shasum to compute a digest of files you want to upload. 2. Use gsutil -m to upload all the files to Cloud Storage. 3. Use gsutil cp to download the uploaded files. 4. Use Linux shasum to compute a digest of the downloaded files. 5. Compare the hashes.

B. 1. Use gsutil -m to upload the files to Cloud Storage. 2. Develop a custom Java application that computes CRC32C hashes. 3. Use gsutil ls -L gs://[YOUR_BUCKET_NAME] to collect CRC32C hashes of the uploaded files. 4. Compare the hashes.
C. 1. Use gsutil -m to upload all the files to Cloud Storage. 2. Use gsutil cp to download the uploaded files. 3. Use Linux diff to compare the content of the files.

D. 1. Use gsutil -m to upload the files to Cloud Storage. 2. Use gsutil hash -c FILE_NAME to generate CRC32C hashes of all on-premises files. 3. Use gsutil ls -L gs://[YOUR_BUCKET_NAME] to collect CRC32C hashes of the uploaded files. 4. Compare the hashes.
description:
題目重點：
• 使用案例：上傳多個重要檔案到 Cloud Storage
• 特性：上傳完成後要驗證檔案內容與本地一致
• 需求：
  1. 成本低
  2. 操作簡單
  3. 避免不必要的檔案下載或重複傳輸

選項分析：

A. 使用 shasum 下載後比對
• ❌ 問題：
  • 需要重新下載整個檔案 → 浪費網路成本
  • 操作繁瑣

B. gsutil + 自製 Java 程式比對 CRC32C
• ❌ 問題：
  • 過於複雜，需要額外開發程式
  • Google 已提供內建 CRC32C 功能

C. gsutil 上傳後下載再 diff
• ❌ 問題：
  • 需要下載所有檔案 → 成本高
  • 不符合「最小化成本」

D. gsutil hash + gsutil ls -L 比對 CRC32C
• ✅ 優點：
  • 只需計算本地檔案的 CRC32C
  • 使用 gsutil 自帶功能查看 Cloud Storage 上的 CRC32C
  • 不需下載檔案 → 低成本、低操作複雜度
  • 完全符合題目需求

question: You have deployed an application on Anthos clusters (formerly Anthos GKE). According to the SRE practices at your company, you need to be alerted if request latency is above a certain threshold for a specified amount of time. What should you do?
choices: A. Install Anthos Service Mesh on your cluster. Use the Google Cloud Console to define a Service Level Objective (SLO), and create an alerting policy based on this SLO.
B. Enable the Cloud Trace API on your project, and use Cloud Monitoring Alerts to send an alert based on the Cloud Trace metrics.

C. Use Cloud Profiler to follow up the request latency. Create a custom metric in Cloud Monitoring based on the results of Cloud Profiler, and create an Alerting policy in case this metric exceeds the threshold.
D. Configure Anthos Config Management on your cluster, and create a yaml file that defines the SLO and alerting policy you want to deploy in your cluster.
description:
題目重點：
• 使用案例：應用部署在 Anthos (GKE) Cluster
• 特性：公司 SRE 需求 → 當請求延遲超過門檻且持續一定時間時，必須收到警示
• 需求：
  1. 監控請求延遲
  2. 設定 Service Level Objective (SLO)
  3. 當 SLO 違反時觸發警示

選項分析：

A. Anthos Service Mesh + SLO + Alerting
• ✅ 優點：
  • Anthos Service Mesh 可以收集每個微服務間的請求延遲、流量等 telemetry
  • Cloud Console 可以直接定義 SLO，並基於 SLO 建立 Alerting policy
  • 完全符合題目需求

B. Cloud Trace + Cloud Monitoring Alerts
• ❌ 問題：
  • Cloud Trace 主要用於分佈式追蹤單一請求的延遲與呼叫鏈分析
  • 它顯示延遲樣本與分佈情況，但不適合用於長期整體延遲監控
  • 雖可導出部分 metrics 至 Monitoring，但無法原生支援 SLO 或自動警示

C. Cloud Profiler + 自訂指標
• ❌ 問題：
  • Cloud Profiler 用於分析應用程式 CPU/記憶體使用，不適合直接監控請求延遲
  • 需要額外建立自訂指標，增加複雜度

D. Anthos Config Management + YAML 定義 SLO
• ❌ 問題：
  • Config Management 用於管理配置一致性
  • 無法直接收集延遲 telemetry 或建立警示

question: Your company has a stateless web API that performs scientific calculations. The web API runs on a single Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE) cluster. The cluster is currently deployed in us-central1. Your company has expanded to offer your API to customers in Asia. You want to reduce the latency for users in Asia. What should you do?
choices: A. Create a second GKE cluster in asia-southeast1, and expose both APIs using a Service of type LoadBalancer. Add the public IPs to the Cloud DNS zone.
B. Use a global HTTP(s) load balancer with Cloud CDN enabled.
C. Create a second GKE cluster in asia-southeast1, and use kubemci(GKE Multi-Cluster Ingress) to create a global HTTP(s) load balancer.
D. Increase the memory and CPU allocated to the application in the cluster.
description:
題目重點：
• 使用案例：無狀態 (stateless) Web API，執行科學計算
• 特性：目前單一 GKE Cluster 在 us-central1，公司擴展到亞洲市場 → 需要降低亞洲用戶延遲
• 需求：
  1. 全球可用 → 需要多區/多區域部署
  2. 自動流量路由到最近地區
  3. 無需手動管理 IP 或 DNS

選項分析：

A. 第二個 GKE Cluster + Service type LoadBalancer + 手動 DNS
• ❌ 問題：
  • 雖然有多區部署，但每個集群都有單獨的 LoadBalancer
  • 需要手動將公網 IP 加入 Cloud DNS → 流量不會自動路由到最近的 cluster

B. 全球 HTTP(S) Load Balancer + Cloud CDN
• ❌ 問題：
  • Cloud CDN 適合靜態內容快取，對於動態科學計算 API 幫助有限
  • 單一集群仍在 us-central1，亞洲用戶延遲不會改善

C. 第二個 GKE Cluster + kubemci → 全球 HTTP(S) Load Balancer
• ✅ 優點：
  • kubemci 可以自動配置多區/多區域 GKE 集群的全球 HTTP(S) LB
  • 流量會自動路由到最靠近的集群 → 減少延遲
  • 適合無狀態應用，可水平擴展

D. 增加 Cluster CPU/Memory
• ❌ 問題：
  • 只能增加單集群效能，無法改善地理延遲

question: You are migrating third-party applications from optimized on-premises virtual machines to Google Cloud. You are unsure about the optimum CPU and memory options. The applications have a consistent usage pattern across multiple weeks. You want to optimize resource usage for the lowest cost. What should you do?
choices: A. Create an instance template with the smallest available machine type, and use an image of the third-party application taken from a current on-premises virtual machine. Create a managed instance group that uses average CPU utilization to autoscale the number of instances in the group. Modify the average CPU utilization threshold to optimize the number of instances running.

B. Create an App Engine flexible environment, and deploy the third-party application using a Dockerfile and a custom runtime. Set CPU and memory options similar to your application's current on-premises virtual machine in the app.yaml file.

C. Create multiple Compute Engine instances with varying CPU and memory options. Install the Cloud Monitoring agent, and deploy the third-party application on each of them. Run a load test with high traffic levels on the application, and use the results to determine the optimal settings.

D. Create a Compute Engine instance with CPU and memory options similar to your application's current on-premises virtual machine. Install the Cloud Monitoring agent, and deploy the third-party application. Run a load test with normal traffic levels on the application, and follow the Rightsizing Recommendations in the Cloud Console.
description:
題目重點：
• 使用案例：將第三方應用從優化的 on-prem VM 遷移到 Google Cloud
• 特性：不確定最佳 CPU/Memory 配置，使用模式穩定（連續數週）
• 需求：
  1. 優化資源使用 → 不浪費 CPU/Memory
  2. 最低成本
  3. 不希望過度估算或浪費

選項分析：

A. 小型機器 + MIG 自動調整 CPU 使用率
• ❌ 問題：
  • 適合動態負載或波動型工作負載
  • 題目明確說「使用模式穩定」 → 自動擴縮意義不大

B. App Engine Flexible + Docker + 自訂 CPU/Memory
• ❌ 問題：
  • 可設定 CPU/Memory，但需要先知道最佳配置
  • 適合雲原生應用，不一定適合第三方封裝 VM

C. 多台不同配置 Compute Engine + 高負載測試
• ❌ 問題：
  • 測試使用高流量，可能過度估算資源
  • 題目強調「一致使用模式」，不需要模擬峰值

D. 單台 Compute Engine + Cloud Monitoring + 正常流量測試 + Rightsizing Recommendations
• ✅ 優點：
  • 使用正常流量測試 → 反映實際需求
  • Rightsizing Recommendations → Google Cloud 提供最佳 CPU/Memory 配置建議，降低成本
  • 適合穩定工作負載

關鍵概念：
• Rightsizing Recommendations：Cloud Monitoring 會分析 VM 實際使用率，建議調整 CPU/Memory，達到成本與效能最佳化
• 穩定負載 vs. 波動負載：波動負載適合自動擴縮，穩定負載適合依實際使用調整資源

question: Your company has a Google Cloud project that uses BigQuery for data warehousing. They have a VPN tunnel between the on-premises environment and Google Cloud that is configured with Cloud VPN. The security team wants to avoid data exfiltration by malicious insiders, compromised code, and accidental oversharing. What should they do?
choices: A. Configure Private Google Access for on-premises only.
B. Perform the following tasks: 1. Create a service account. 2. Give the BigQuery JobUser role and Storage Reader role to the service account. 3. Remove all other IAM access from the project.
C. Configure VPC Service Controls and configure Private Google Access.
D. Configure Private Google Access.
description:
題目重點：
• 環境：BigQuery data warehouse
• 已有：Cloud VPN 連線 on-prem ↔ Google Cloud
• 需求：避免資料外洩（data exfiltration） → 包含惡意內部人員、被入侵程式、誤分享

選項分析：

A. Configure Private Google Access for on-premises only
• ❌ 問題：
  • Private Google Access 只是讓 VM 沒有 public IP 也能存取 Google API
  • 無法防止資料外洩

B. 用 service account + 移除其他 IAM 權限
• ❌ 問題：
  • 縮小存取範圍，但無法阻止惡意或錯誤的外部分享
  • 不符合「防 data exfiltration」需求

C. VPC Service Controls + Private Google Access
• ✅ 優點：
  • VPC Service Controls 建立安全邊界，防止 BigQuery 資料被外洩到非信任來源
  • Private Google Access 確保 VM 在 private subnet 也能安全使用 Google API
  • 兩者搭配最符合防止資料外洩需求

D. 單獨 Private Google Access
• ❌ 問題：
  • 無法防止資料外洩，僅確保 VM 能存取 Google API

關鍵概念：
• VPC Service Controls：提供資料防外洩邊界，可限制資料存取來源
• Private Google Access：讓 private subnet VM 可安全存取 Google API
• 防止 data exfiltration 的最佳做法：兩者搭配使用

question: You are working at an institution that processes medical data. You are migrating several workloads onto Google Cloud. Company policies require all workloads to run on physically separated hardware, and workloads from different clients must also be separated. You created a sole-tenant node group and added a node for each client. You need to deploy the workloads on these dedicated hosts. What should you do?
choices: A. Add the node group name as a network tag when creating Compute Engine instances in order to host each workload on the correct node group.
B. Add the node name as a network tag when creating Compute Engine instances in order to host each workload on the correct node.
C. Use node affinity labels based on the node group name when creating Compute Engine instances in order to host each workload on the correct node group.
D. Use node affinity labels based on the node name when creating Compute Engine instances in order to host each workload on the correct node.
description:
題目重點：
• 場景：醫療資料機構，需要將多個 workloads 遷移到 Google Cloud
• 隔離要求：所有 workloads 必須運行在物理隔離硬體（dedicated hosts），不同客戶的 workloads 必須隔離
• 已做準備：建立 Sole-tenant node group，為每個客戶分配一個 node
• 需求：將 workloads 部署到對應的 dedicated node

選項分析：

A. Node group name + network tag
• ❌ 問題：
  • Network tag 僅影響防火牆或路由，不控制 instance placement

B. Node name + network tag
• ❌ 問題：
  • Network tag 無法控制 instance 必須運行在哪個 node

C. Node group name + node affinity
• ❌ 問題：
  • 適用於把 workloads 部署到整個 node group，但題目要求每個客戶分配到單一 node，不僅是 node group

D. Node name + node affinity
• ✅ 優點：
  • Node affinity 可用於指定 instance 必須運行在特定 node
  • 對應題目要求每個客戶的 workload 在單獨的物理 node 上，符合隔離政策

關鍵概念：
• Sole-tenant node：專屬實體主機，保證物理隔離
• Node affinity：可指定 workload 部署到單一 node，以 node name 作為標籤更精確，符合單客戶單 node 的隔離需求
• Node group：對應多個 node 的集合，若需求是單客戶單 node，使用 node group 不夠精細

question: Your company's test suite is a custom C++ application that runs tests throughout each day on Linux virtual machines. The full test suite takes several hours to complete, running on a limited number of on-premises servers reserved for testing. Your company wants to move the testing infrastructure to the cloud, to reduce the amount of time it takes to fully test a change to the system, while changing the tests as little as possible. Which cloud infrastructure should you recommend?
choices: A. Google Compute Engine unmanaged instance groups and Network Load Balancer
B. Google Compute Engine managed instance groups with auto-scaling
C. Google Cloud Dataproc to run Apache Hadoop jobs to process each test
D. Google App Engine with Google StackDriver(Cloud Monitoring) for logging
description:
題目重點：
• 場景：自訂 C++ 測試套件，全天運行於 Linux VM
• 特性：完整測試需數小時，現有硬體有限，測試耗時長
• 需求：
  • 將測試基礎設施移至雲端
  • 減少完整測試時間
  • 盡量不用改動測試程式

選項分析：

A. Compute Engine unmanaged instance groups + Network Load Balancer
• ❌ 問題：
  • 不適合自動擴展與自動管理 VM
  • 不方便快速分散工作負載，仍需手動管理

B. Compute Engine managed instance groups + auto-scaling
• ✅ 優點：
  • 可自動建立多個相同 VM（使用相同映像檔安裝測試環境）
  • 支援自動擴展，在測試需求高峰快速建立更多 VM
  • 減少測試完成時間，對現有測試程式改動最小

C. Cloud Dataproc / Hadoop jobs
• ❌ 問題：
  • 適合大規模資料處理，非針對 C++ 測試套件
  • 需重構測試套件才能跑在 Hadoop

D. App Engine + Stackdriver
• ❌ 問題：
  • App Engine 適合 web 應用
  • C++ 測試套件無法直接執行

關鍵概念：
• Managed Instance Group (MIG)：自動管理 VM，支援自動擴展，可用同一映像檔快速建立多個 VM
• Auto-scaling：根據 CPU、排隊工作或自訂指標自動調整 VM 數量，減少測試排隊時間，縮短整個測試流程

question: A lead software engineer tells you that his new application design uses websockets and HTTP sessions that are not distributed across the web servers. You want to help him ensure his application will run properly on Google Cloud Platform. What should you do?
choices: A. Help the engineer to convert his websocket code to use HTTP streaming
B. Review the encryption requirements for websocket connections with the security team
C. Meet with the cloud operations team and the engineer to discuss load balancer options
D. Help the engineer redesign the application to use a distributed user session service that does not rely on websockets and HTTP sessions.
description:
題目重點：
• 場景：新應用使用 WebSockets 和 HTTP sessions
• 特性：Sessions 沒有分散式存放 → 如果部署多個 web server，使用者 session 可能無法正確共享
• 需求：
  • 確保應用在 Google Cloud Platform (GCP) 上能正確運行
  • 支援水平擴展且考慮 WebSocket 特性

選項分析：

A. Convert websocket code to HTTP streaming
• ❌ 問題：
  • 只是改通訊協定
  • 無法解決 session 依賴單一 server 的問題

B. Review encryption requirements for websocket connections
• ❌ 問題：
  • 僅檢查安全性
  • 與水平擴展或 session 同步無關

C. Meet with cloud operations team and engineer to discuss load balancer options
• ✅ 優點：
  • WebSocket 和 HTTP session 需要適當的負載平衡策略
  • 可使用 HTTP(S) Load Balancer + session affinity (sticky sessions)
  • 在不改動應用的情況下，確保 WebSocket 與 session 在多個伺服器間正常運作

D. Redesign application to use a distributed user session service
• ⚠️ 注意：
  • 從架構上是最佳做法，但題目強調快速解決 GCP 部署問題 → 重新設計成本高、耗時

關鍵概念：
• WebSocket 與 GCP Load Balancer：長連線需用 sticky sessions (session affinity) 確保連線回到同一台 server
• 實務建議：與雲端運維團隊討論負載平衡配置，可在不改動應用程式的情況下支持水平擴展

question: The application reliability team at your company added a debug feature to their backend service to send all server events to Google Cloud Storage for eventual analysis. The event records are at least 50 KB and at most 15 MB and are expected to peak at 3,000 events per second. You want to minimize data loss. Which process should you implement?
choices: A. Append metadata to file body, compress individual files, name files with serverName - Timestamp, create a new bucket if bucket is older than 1 hour and save individual files to the new bucket. Otherwise, save files to existing bucket.

B. Batch every 10,000 events with a single manifest file for metadata, compress event files and manifest file into a single archive file, name files using serverName - EventSequence, create a new bucket if bucket is older than 1 day and save the single archive file to the new bucket. Otherwise, save the single archive file to existing bucket.
C. Compress individual files, name files with serverName - EventSequence, save files to one bucket, set custom metadata headers for each object after saving.
D. Append metadata to file body, compress individual files, name files with a random prefix pattern, save files to one bucket.
description:
題目重點：
• 環境：後端服務 debug feature → 將 server events 存到 GCS
• 事件大小：50 KB ~ 15 MB
• 峰值：3,000 events/sec
• 需求：最小化資料遺失

選項分析：

A. 每個事件一個檔案
• ❌ 問題：
  • 高頻率下會產生大量小檔案，管理成本高
  • 每小時換桶增加操作複雜度

B. 批次壓縮成單一 archive
• ❌ 問題：
  • 雖然降低操作次數，但單檔出錯會造成大量事件丟失

C. 每個事件壓縮 + 後續設定 metadata
• ❌ 問題：
  • 非原子操作，失敗風險高

D. 每個事件附加 metadata、壓縮、隨機 prefix 存到單桶
• ✅ 優點：
  • 簡單可靠，減少操作步驟
  • 適合高頻率事件寫入，降低資料遺失風險

關鍵概念：
• 高頻率事件寫入 GCS 的最佳實務：單桶 + 隨機 prefix + metadata，可確保可靠性並降低資料遺失風險
